zh_TW: 在聖艾爾魔法學院，前大的定義只有一種：［天賦］
en: in Saint El Magic Academy, there is only one definition of "gift": [talent].

zh_TW: 當同儕們忙著精進破壞性的禁咒時，我卻整天對著那些無法溝通的魔力生物發愁。
en: While my peers were busy honing their destructive forbidden spells, I was struggling with those uncommunicative magical creatures all day long.

zh_TW: 對導師來說，我是一個學術偏才，但也是個實戰廢物。
en: To my mentor, I was an academic prodigy, but also a practical failure.
As expected, I extended my graduation...

zh_TW: 畢業典禮這天，導師找我到辦公室...
en: On the day of the graduation ceremony, my mentor called me to the office...

zh_TW:
{{Persistence.data.player_name}}，你是個天才。
你的共鳴理論很可能改變整個魔法界。
en: {{Persistence.data.player_name}}, you are a genius. your resonance theory is likely to change the entire magical world.

zh_TW: 但是沒有實踐，理論永遠只是理論。
en: But without practice, theory will always be just theory.

zh_TW: 這是翠嶺谷的調研通知，那裏的魔力如同一團亂麻，所有魔法在那裏都會顯得蒼白無力。
en: This is a research notice for Emerald Ridge Valley, where the magical power is like a tangled mess, and all magic there will appear pale and powerless.

zh_TW: 只有在那種鬼地方完成你的生態調研，你的理論才能被全世界看見，我等你的好消息。
en: Only by completing your ecological research in such a hellish place can your theory be seen by the whole world. I await your good news.
